title: Tunisian Apricot Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew originating from the city of Tunis, typically made with meat or vegetables. Here's a vegetarian version featuring sweet apricots.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the chopped apricots, paprika, cinnamon, ginger, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the hot water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the flavors have melded together and the apricots are tender.
Serve hot over couscous or rice.
